demo.title: stash.mjs — derive account + encode unwrap
demo.code:
# Derive a Stash's token-bound account address (Robinhood Chain)
ACCOUNT_IMPL=0xf7D4E66eA5b88B62a4aEb1E531e483B947B6151D \
  node hoodrunner-stash/scripts/stash.mjs account \
  0xA5718a030bd9dC18EB0b23B5409D86AA66A11944 1

# Encode an unwrap: holder sweeps a token out of the Stash's account
node hoodrunner-stash/scripts/stash.mjs unwrap <account> <token> <amount>

# Hand the encoded calldata to the Bankr Wallet API to sign + submit

setup: Get a Bankr API key (bk_...) with walletApiEnabled — see the base `bankr` skill. Read-only keys can call `nav`.
Target Robinhood Chain (chain id 4663) — Bankr supports RHC natively.
Contracts are live on RHC mainnet (addresses in references/stash-contracts.md); `npm i viem` to run scripts/stash.mjs.
